items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
items.description: After the party of heroes defeated the Demon King, they restored peace to the land and returned to lives of solitude. Generations pass, and the elven mage Frieren comes face to face with humanity’s mortality. She takes on a new apprentice and promises to fulfill old friends’ dying wishes. Can an elven mind make peace with the nature of life and death? Frieren embarks on her quest to find out.
items.promo_description: After the party of heroes defeated the Demon King, they restored peace to the land and returned to lives of solitude. Generations pass, and the elven mage Frieren comes face to face with humanity’s mortality. She takes on a new apprentice and promises to fulfill old friends’ dying wishes. Can an elven mind make peace with the nature of life and death? Frieren embarks on her quest to find out.

items.title: Kemono Friends
items.description: The story takes place in Japari Park, an enormous integrated zoo built somewhere in this world. A mysterious substance found there, called "Sand Star," causes the animals to turn into humanoid beings called "Animal Girls"! These new creatures spend every day peacefully with the zoo's visitors... but after some time, a lost child turns up in the park. The child's attempt to find the way home turns into a great adventure with the Animal Girls!

items.title: Girl Friend BETA
items.description: Based on the super hit SNS game of the same title which has amassed over five million subscribers in just about one year and a half, Girl Friend BETA exposes everyday life of high school girls, told intimately from their own perspective. You will live their lives their way, as they meet people, worry about their big trivia, tackling small problems and making challenges that seem like nothing to others.
items.promo_description: Based on the super hit SNS game of the same title which has amassed over five million subscribers in just about one year and a half, Girl Friend BETA exposes everyday life of high school girls, told intimately from their own perspective. You will live their lives their way, as they meet people, worry about their big trivia, tackling small problems and making challenges that seem like nothing to others.

items.title: Happy Tree Friends
items.description: Happy Tree Friends are cute, cuddly animals, innocently navigating the world and always encountering violent outcomes. The cast of characters, including Cuddles, Giggles, Lumpy, and Toothy, repeatedly get maimed episode after episode, but are never the wiser for it. Blood always spills and mutilation abounds, but the absurdity of what these animals endure always guarantees laughter.

Blood always spills and mutilation abounds, but the absurdity of what these animals endure always guarantees laughter.

items.title: My Deer Friend Nokotan
items.description: Koshi Torako has everyone fooled. Her classmates see her as the perfect honor student, unaware of her secret delinquent past. But her new picturesque school life is thrown into chaos when she bumps into Shikanoko Noko, a girl with antlers! Mayhem seems to follow this strange doe-eyed girl. Who, or what, is she?
items.promo_description: Koshi Torako has everyone fooled. Her classmates see her as the perfect honor student, unaware of her secret delinquent past. items.title: Natsume's Book of Friends
items.description: Takashi Natsume has been able to see youkai, Japanese monsters, his whole life.  He inherited a book of youkai names from his grandmother, Reiko.  These names give their owner power over the youkai, so he and his self-proclaimed bodyguard "Nyanko-sensei" spend their days returning them to their original owners.  As Natsume finally finds a place where he feels welcome, he meets and says goodbye to new Youkai....

items.title: Frieren the Slayer
items.description: As tensions in Graf Granat's domain reach a breaking point, Fern and Stark find their own resolve - and Frieren resumes an old duty.
